name: Premium Hardened Steel Padlock 50mm
short_description: Unbreakable hardened steel padlock for maximum security.
description: This premium padlock is made from hardened steel to resist cutting, sawing, and drilling. Ideal for warehouses, gates, and high-security areas.

name: Smart Fingerprint Door Lock
short_description: Keyless entry with advanced biometric fingerprint recognition.
description: Upgrade your home security with this smart door lock. Supports fingerprint, PIN code, and physical emergency keys. Easy installation and long battery life.

name: Heavy Duty Motorcycle Disc Lock
short_description: Compact and powerful theft deterrent for motorcycles.
description: Secure your bike with this heavy-duty disc lock. Made from solid steel, it features a loud alarm (optional) and is resistant to picking and freezing.

name: High-Security U-Lock for Bicycle
short_description: Class-leading U-lock for urban bicycle security.
description: A robust U-lock designed for city commuters. Features a double-bolted shackle and a pick-resistant cylinder. Includes a mounting bracket for easy transport.
